how to buy

Buy On Site
Send to Wallet
1

Connect Your Crypto Wallet

Scroll to the payment widget on the site and click the “Connect Wallet” button. Follow the prompts to link your wallet. Make sure you have sufficient funds to cover both the purchase amount and the network transaction fee for your selected currency (ETH, SOL, USDC, USDT, or BNB).
2

Select Token and Amount

Choose the currency you wish to use and input the number of BPEP tokens you want to buy. Double-check your wallet balance to ensure it can cover the transaction.
3

Buy and Approve the Transaction

Confirm your purchase by approving the transaction inside your connected wallet. Once approved, your tokens will be recorded on-chain!

Tokens

The number of tokens calculated based on the timestamp of your transaction and the price at that time. You will see your wallet balance when you connect the wallet you used to purchase your tokens to the Bitcoin Pepe website.

Claim

You will be able to claim your tokens at the end of the presale. A complete guide on claiming your tokens will be available on our website.

1,000,000 $BPEP

Weekly Giveaway 🚨

Every week, we're giving away a massive 1,000,000 $BPEP tokens to our community! 🐸💥
It’s simple: Get involved, stay active, and you could be one of the lucky frogs hopping away with a huge stack of $BPEP. No gimmicks, just pure action. 💸🔥
Join the chaos, frens. The more you participate, the higher your chances! 🐸🚀

Meet The Team

Nate Sherrod

Head Of Community

Nate Sherrod is a web3 veteran with a proven track record of social media & community management, developing partnerships, and launching growth campaigns for projects including Wildxyz, Sphynx Labs, Palm NFT Studio, & DC Comics Bat Cowls.

Now, he's bringing his expertise in community leadership to Bitcoin Pepe. A firm believer in both Bitcoin and the power of memes, Nate is excited to join the team building the first-ever DEX for the Bitcoin ecosystem. He's committed to being a valuable resource for the community and spreading positive $BPEP vibes!

Collin Ford

Technical Advisor

Collin Ford is a generational web3 leader with exceptional talent in bringing visionary ideas to life known for his executive work, consulting and oversight of 100+ startups since 2015 including several brands such as DexToro, My Lil Gnomie NFT, ElevenThirteen Apps and beyond. With a burning passion for intriguing 21st century technology - he looks to bring his years of experience to accelerate the wide stream adoption of everything Bitcoin Pepe has to offer to the World.
